command.refresh.title: Claude Usage: Refresh Now
command.setToken.title: Claude Usage: Enter Token Manually
command.setCredentialsPath.title: Claude Usage: Set Credentials File Path
command.installSkill.title: Claude Usage: Install Skill
config.credentialsPath.description: Path to a custom Claude Code credentials JSON file (e.g. ~/.claude/.credentials.json). Provides full credentials including plan type. Takes priority over the manual token.
config.title: Ludev Code Metrics
view.container.title: Ludev Code Metrics
view.usage.name: Usage
config.autoRefresh.description: Enable automatic periodic refresh of usage data (disabled by default)
config.manualToken.description: Manual OAuth token fallback if automatic credential resolution fails
config.costRates.description: Per-million-token pricing rates (USD) for context cost estimation. Defaults match Claude Sonnet 4 pricing.
config.warningThreshold.description: Usage percentage at which the warning color activates
config.viewMode.description: Sidebar view mode: 'extended' shows Session & Weekly cards, 'compact' shows Overview only
config.accounts.description: Named accounts for multi-account support. Each entry requires a label plus either token or credentialsPath. The label '__default__' is reserved for auto-detection.
